channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Man fell on an unstable flagstone on 23rd feb approx10.08 am, 2nd March
item.description:
Oustide 76 promenade
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 76, Promenade, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This is now a dangerous pothole., 2nd March
item.description:
What three words location: matter.force.retain outside three gables, Southcourt Drive, Leckhampton

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Southcourt Drive, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 70cm pothole in road on very busy junction in Cowley, 2nd March
item.description:
What 3 words location ///belonged.magically.coaster

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cowley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 bags of recycling by the bin ref:- 0230 which is near the Greyhound pub traffic lights on the main Cheltenham to Gloucester Road, 2nd March
item.description:
Email of 2/3/26 1039 hours - Volunteer litter picker 2 bags of recycling have been left by the bin ref:- 0230 which is near the Greyhound pub traffic lights on the main Cheltenham to Gloucester Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Litter picking bags ready for collection

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 2nd March
item.description:
CWPH 800 X 400 X 50mm LANE CLOSURE MARKED AS NUMBER 1 PLUS 2 X NSD (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 2nd March
item.description:
ENWD STATS REQUIRED PLEASE MAKE FENCE SAFE FOOTWAY CLOSURE (Damaged Street Furniture)

item.title: Pothole present left side of carriageway, 2nd March
item.description:
Just before the opening of the verge to the access road, just prior to the carriage way turning right
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Gloucester Road, Springbank, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bridge is damaged/missing problem, 2nd March
item.description:
rotten planks on bridge - not sure if can be repaired. New Glos Way sign needed and vegetation trimming back.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 2nd March
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please lift and relay x1 rocking sunken 200x450x20mm slab number 1 (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 2nd March
item.description:
